description: You are a nanotechnology engineering technician characterizing a Au-Pb-Sn solder alloy using an SEM micrograph in Fiji. Spatially calibrate the 800-pixel wide image using the provided Horizontal Field Width (HFW) of 256 µm. Measure the width (longest dimension) of at least 10 distinct bright Au-rich grains in µm. Annotate the image with a 50 µm scale bar in the lower right (White, Black background, Font size 14, Bold) and flatten the result. Save the annotated image to ~/Fiji_Data/results/sem/annotated_sem.png and the measurement table to ~/Fiji_Data/results/sem/grain_measurements.csv. Create a summary report at ~/Fiji_Data/results/sem/measurement_summary.txt including the grain count, mean width, standard deviation, and the calibration value used.
